parameters.name: file
parameters.label: File
parameters.description: Path of source.

parameters.name: reloadpulse
parameters.label: Reload
parameters.description: Instantly reload the file from disk.

parameters.name: play
parameters.label: Play
parameters.description: Audio will playback when this is set to 1 and stop when set to 0.

parameters.name: playmode
parameters.label: Play Mode
parameters.description: Specifies the method used to playback the audio, there are 3 options.

parameters.name: speed
parameters.label: Speed
parameters.description: This is a speed multiplier which only works when Play Mode is

parameters.name: cue
parameters.label: Cue
parameters.description: Jumps to Cue when set to 1. Only available when Play Mode is Sequential.

parameters.name: cuepulse
parameters.label: Cue Pulse
parameters.description: Instantly jumps to the Cue .

parameters.name: cuepoint
parameters.label: Cue Point
parameters.description: Set any index in the song as a point to jump to.

parameters.name: cuepointunit
parameters.label: Cue Point Unit
parameters.description: Units used when setting the Cue parameter.

parameters.name: index
parameters.label: Index
parameters.description: This parameter explicitly sets the song position when Play Mode is set to Specify Index. The units menu on the right lets you specify the index in the following units: Index, Frames, or Seconds.

parameters.name: indexunit
parameters.label: Index Unit
parameters.description: Units used for the Index parameter.

parameters.name: timecodeop
parameters.label: Timecode Object/CHOP/DAT
parameters.description: Set the audio file index with a reference to a timecode. Should be a reference to either a with channels 'hour', 'second', 'minute', 'frame', a with a timecode string in its first cell, or a object.

parameters.name: repeat
parameters.label: Repeat
parameters.description: Repeats the audio stream when the end is reached.

parameters.name: trim
parameters.label: Trim
parameters.description: Enables the Trim parameters below.

parameters.name: trimstart
parameters.label: Trim Start
parameters.description: Sets an point from the beginning of the audio, allowing you to trim the starting position of the audio stream. The units menu on the right let you specify this position by index, frames, or seconds.

parameters.name: trimstartunit
parameters.label: Trim Start Unit
parameters.description: Units used for the Trim Start parameter.

parameters.name: trimend
parameters.label: Trim End
parameters.description: Sets an point from the end of the audio, allowing you to trim the ending position of the audio stream. The units menu on the right let you specify this position by index, frames, or seconds.

parameters.name: trimendunit
parameters.label: Trim End Unit
parameters.description: Units used for the Trim End parameter.

parameters.name: prereadlength
parameters.label: Pre-Read Length
parameters.description: The amount of audio to buffer to maintain smooth playback. This will slightly impact memory usage, but does create any delay in the audio.

parameters.name: prereadlengthunit
parameters.label: Pre-Read Length Unit
parameters.description: Units used for the Pre-Read Length parameter.

parameters.name: opentimeout
parameters.label: Open Timeout
parameters.description: The time (in milliseconds) TouchDesigner will wait for the audio file to open. If the Open Timeout time is reached, the Audio File In will stop waiting, and play silence. If the file still isn't opene

parameters.name: mono
parameters.label: Mono
parameters.description: Output mono channel only even if file has multiple channels.

parameters.name: volume
parameters.label: Volume
parameters.description: Set the level the file is read in at. A setting of 1 is full signal while 0 is muted.

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page.

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).

parameters.name: fade
parameters.label: Fade
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

examples.label: Configure Time Slice and Index
examples.code:
n = op('audiofilein1')
n.par.timeslice = True
n.par.index = 1.6333333333333333
n.par.mono = True
examples.description: Common settings from 23 real Derivative examples
